name: build-loop
description: Multi-phase build orchestration with integrated debugging: assess, plan, execute, review, iterate. Plan-verify gate on Phase 2. Optional UI design gates. Bundled debug-loop, debugging-memory, logging-tracer skills + MCP incident-memory server. Orchestrator owns when-to-fire; bundled skills own procedural detail; logging-tracer-bridge is an optional escalation hop to the standalone claude-code-debugger supporting plugin for extended capability.
